inputs.model.prompt:
[Style] Magical dreamspace couture fantasy, 8K ultra-clear, Photorealistic, High-fashion Editorial, floating veil architecture, liquid nebula hall, unreal palace interior, soft starlight mist, Hollywood fantasy dissolve, Unreal Engine 5 atmospheric fluid.

Protagonist note:
A female fashion model, mid-20s, editorial silhouette: shoulder-length auburn hair in loose waves, tall lean build, calm confident posture.

[Duration] 5 seconds.

[Scene] A vast palace hall suspended inside a glowing nebula; translucent curtains hang without support; shallow mirror pools reflect a sky that belongs to no real world.

[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: Veil drift.
Camera: medium-wide glide through hanging translucent curtains and mirror pools.
Action: She moves slowly through the hall; the hanging curtains and mirror pools react to her passing.
Effect: Starlight begins collecting inside the air around her path, gathering into luminous dust between curtains rather than inside clothing.

[00:02-00:04] Shot 2: Dust release.
Camera: medium on upper body, surrounding curtains, and the mirror pool edge.
Action: She turns and the nearby suspended curtain field swings outward in one elegant arc.
Effect: The curtain light tears into streams of glowing dust and translucent vapor layers, visibly transforming from architecture-soft fabric into cosmic particulate.

[00:04-00:05] Shot 3: Nebula fade.
Camera: slow crane back to reveal the full impossible hall.
Action: She stands at the center while the new dust-streams move upward through the curtains.
Effect: Curtains, pools, columns, and nebula light all dissolve into a soft cosmic watercolor haze, as if the entire palace were evaporating into magical stardust.
